title: Introduction to Jest Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on the Jest testing framework.

questions.question: Regarding Jest's design, what is a key focus area?
options: To simplify the JavaScript testing process with zero-configuration

questions.question: Which of these is a key feature of Jest for keeping track of large objects with ease?
How does Jest handle test execution to improve performance?
options: It runs tests in parallel and prioritizes previously failed tests
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
